content:
We also reinforced the importance of proper grammar, punctuation, and spelling (CO1) to ensure our writing is clear and professional. Understanding the writing process (CO4) helped us demonstrate the steps in creating well-developed essays. We also incorporated valid and appropriate outside sources (CO5) to support our arguments and add credibility to our work.

Our ultimate goal was to compose essays that are mode, genre, and audience-appropriate, well-developed, mechanically correct, and communicate clearly with the audience (CO6). By mastering these objectives, we improved our writing skills and became more effective communicators.

Congratulations! You completed the course!
